Interface ClanWarpDao

public interface ClanWarpDao
JDBI DAO for the clan_warps and clan_warp_access tables.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    ClanWarpDao.WarpRow
    Raw row from the clan_warps table.

    Method
    Description

    countWarps(String clanId)

    Deletes a warp.

    void
    insertAccess(String clanId, String warpName, String playerUuid)
    Grants a member access to a warp.
    void
    setRestricted(String clanId, String name, boolean restricted)
    Sets whether a warp is restricted to its access list.
    void
    upsertWarp(String clanId, String name, String world, double x, double y, double z, float yaw, float pitch, String icon, String description)
    Inserts a warp, or updates its location, icon, and description if the name already exists for the clan.

  • Method Details

    • upsertWarp

      void upsertWarp(String clanId, String name, String world, double x, double y, double z, float yaw, float pitch, String icon, String description)
      Inserts a warp, or updates its location, icon, and description if the name already exists for the clan. Never changes the restricted flag; new warps default to public.

    • findWarp

      Optional<ClanWarpDao.WarpRow> findWarp(String clanId, String name)
      Returns:
      the warp, or empty if no warp with that name exists for the clan

    • findWarpsByClan

      List<ClanWarpDao.WarpRow> findWarpsByClan(String clanId)
      Returns:
      every warp owned by the clan, ordered by name

    • countWarps

      int countWarps(String clanId)
      Returns:
      the number of warps the clan owns

    • deleteWarp

      void deleteWarp(String clanId, String name)
      Deletes a warp. Access rows for it are removed by the foreign-key cascade.

    • setRestricted

      void setRestricted(String clanId, String name, boolean restricted)
      Sets whether a warp is restricted to its access list.

    • insertAccess

      void insertAccess(String clanId, String warpName, String playerUuid)
      Grants a member access to a warp. Silently ignored if already granted.

    • deleteAccess

      void deleteAccess(String clanId, String warpName, String playerUuid)
      Revokes a member's access to a warp. No-op if not granted.

    • hasAccess

      boolean hasAccess(String clanId, String warpName, String playerUuid)
      Returns:
      true if the member has an access row for the warp

    • findAccessByWarp

      List<String> findAccessByWarp(String clanId, String warpName)
      Returns:
      the UUID strings of all members granted access to the warp

    • findAccessibleWarps

      List<String> findAccessibleWarps(String clanId, String playerUuid)
      Returns:
      the names of all warps the given member has been granted access to
